inputs.name: avatarInteractive
inputs.description:
Defines whether the avatar of the selected account is interactive (focusable and pressable).

When `false` (default), the avatar is rendered as a non-interactive image
and is not announced as a button by screen readers.

*Note:** When `showEditButton` is set to `true`, the avatar is treated as interactive
regardless of this property's value, to preserve the edit affordance.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Defines if the User Menu is opened.

inputs.name: opener
inputs.description:
Defines the ID or DOM Reference of the element at which the user menu is shown.
When using this attribute in a declarative way, you must only use the `id` (as a string) of the element at which you want to show the popover.
You can only set the `opener` attribute to a DOM Reference when using JavaScript.

inputs.name: showEditAccounts
inputs.description: Defines if the User Menu shows the Edit Accounts option.

inputs.name: showEditButton
inputs.description: Defines if the User menu shows edit button.

inputs.name: showManageAccount
inputs.description: Defines if the User Menu shows the Manage Account option.

inputs.name: showOtherAccounts
inputs.description: Defines if the User Menu shows the Other Accounts option.

outputs.name: ui5AvatarClick
outputs.description: Fired when the account avatar is selected.

outputs.name: ui5ChangeAccount
outputs.description: Fired when the account is switched to a different one.

outputs.name: ui5Close
outputs.description: Fired when a user menu is close.

outputs.name: ui5EditAccountsClick
outputs.description: Fired when the "Edit Accounts" button is selected.

outputs.name: ui5ItemClick
outputs.description: Fired when a menu item is selected.

outputs.name: ui5ManageAccountClick
outputs.description: Fired when the "Manage Account" button is selected.

outputs.name: ui5Open
outputs.description: Fired when a user menu is open.

outputs.name: ui5SignOutClick
outputs.description: Fired when the "Sign Out" button is selected.
